# SolidStep

> Full-stack SSR framework for SolidJS built on Vinxi/Nitro: file-based routing under `app/`, server loaders, type-safe server actions and forms, static/ISR/PPR rendering, streaming, and built-in security middleware.

Published on npm as `solidstep`; scaffold a new app with `npm create @varlabs/solidstep@latest my-app`. The documentation is the set of markdown files in this folder; start with [Getting Started](./getting-started.md) and the [API Reference](./api-reference.md).

## Guides

- [Getting Started](./getting-started.md): create a project, special files (page/layout/loading/error/route/actions), configuration, project structure.
- [Routing](./routing.md): pages, layouts, group routes `(group)`, dynamic routes `[slug]`, catch-alls, parallel routes `@slot`.
- [Data Loading](./data-loading.md): `defineLoader`, typed loader data, request context and `locals`, deferred/streaming loaders, timeouts.
- [Data Validation](./data-validation.md): validating params and form data with Standard Schema (Zod/Valibot/ArkType) via `parseActionInput`.
- [Rendering Strategies](./rendering.md): dynamic/static/ISR/PPR via the `render` option, `generateStaticParams`.
- [Server Actions & Forms](./server-actions-and-forms.md): `'use server'` functions, `<Form>`, `useActionState`, `useFormStatus`, progressive enhancement.
- [Metadata](./metadata.md): SEO/head metadata with `generateMeta` and the `meta()` wrapper.
- [Metadata Files](./metadata-files.md): dynamic `robots.txt`, `sitemap.xml`, web manifest, and `llms.txt` routes.
- [Middleware](./middleware.md): request/response interceptors with `defineMiddleware`.
- [Instrumentation](./instrumentation.md): observability hooks and OpenTelemetry integration.
- [Caching](./caching.md): loader and page caching, `invalidateCache`/`invalidateTag`/`revalidatePath`, pluggable cache stores.
- [API Routes](./api-routes.md): REST endpoints with `route.ts`, SSE and streaming responses, server assets.
- [Database & ORM](./database.md): Drizzle/Prisma patterns and connection lifecycle.
- [Performance](./performance.md): choosing a rendering strategy, caching, streaming, metrics, bundle analysis.
- [Security](./security.md): cookies, CORS, CSP, CSRF, rate limiting, safe redirects, error handling, server-only code.
- [Utilities](./utilities.md): logging, fetch wrappers, preloading and prefetching strategies.
- [Assets & Environment](./assets-and-env.md): fonts, images, environment variables.
- [Client-Only Rendering](./client-only.md): `ClientOnly` JSX boundary vs the `clientOnly` HOC, and avoiding `<Show>`-driven hydration mismatches.

## Reference

- [Architecture](./architecture.md): request lifecycle, route manifest, render strategies, streaming/deferred/PPR, soft navigation, hydration, server-action serialization.
- [API Reference](./api-reference.md): every public `solidstep/...` import mapped to a description and docs page.
- [Testing](./testing.md): unit testing loaders/actions/components with Vitest, end-to-end testing with Playwright.
- [Troubleshooting](./troubleshooting.md): common issues and fixes.

## Operations

- [Deployment](./deployment.md): building, Nitro presets, environment variables, Docker, Node requirements.
- [Roadmap](./roadmap.md): planned features and direction.
